hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo 'graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files.' || true

echo '$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH' | grep -qE '\.(md)$' && cd /home/char/Desktop/Hair && node ops/tooling/seo-enrich.js "$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH' | sed 's|/home/char/Desktop/Hair/||')" 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^[✓✗]' || true
